body:
In addition, this PR solves #213: boundary conditions in `z` can now be set by writing

```julia
model.boundary_conditions.T.z.top = top_bc
model.boundary_conditions.T.z.bottom = bottom_bc
```

for any field `T`.

In a future PR: physics tests that verify the boundary bc is correct.
title: Adds Value Boundary Condition (BC), improves BC function signatures, GPU BC tests
